title: Atlas model catalog
description: Validates services/ollama/models.yaml (flat sections) and services/litellm/models.yaml (provider-keyed sections).

oneOf.title: Flat-sections format (Ollama)
oneOf.description: Top-level keys are section names (content, embeddings, vision), each an array of model entries.

oneOf.title: Provider-keyed format (LiteLLM / cloud)
oneOf.description: Top-level keys are provider names; each value is a section map.

dim.description: Embedding output vector dimension; matched against the consumer's required dimension (backend memory_facts vector(768)).
